[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0101111010 6
2 0010110110 5
3 1001101111 7
4 1101111011 8
5 1101101011 7
6 1001010010 4
7 1001001001 4

70 07 1001000010 3
